message: Morning team! Feeling pumped for the big ?Hipster Haul? event this week?

Hey team, just dropping in to emphasise the urgency of resolving this issue swiftly. We've got a major event on the horizon - the launch of our exclusive "Hipster Haul Weekend" next week.
It's poised to be our biggest sale yet, and any delays caused by this payment glitch could seriously impact our preparations.
Let's prioritise frequent updates and keep the communication channels wide open.

ill check the platform just incase it hasn't made anything worse

:star: Reproduces the incident
401 means the API key is invalid or expired
Recent change CHG89692 updated API licenses
But the outage started 2 hours after the last deploy…
Hamed Can you confirm the API changes you made on above change
Cache TTL is 12 hours. If the key was wrong but the cache warm, failure would be delayed
Yes correct, I made the change to the service above
My change only updated API keys. It passed regression
I don’t see how that would suddenly fail hours later
Can we confirm the correct API key was put in please?
:star: Facts over opinion
We’re getting 401s from the FX provider now, right after cache expired
I’m not questioning your judgement, but why do you think it’s my change specifically?

We are getting 401 errors in currencyservice:
ERROR 401 Unauthorized - Exchange Rate Provider
I see, I will check the API keys now
Bob Can you let our customers know we're looking into the website issues please?
Thank you
Sure, I will send the comms out now
Looks like the keys were misconfigured
we're gonna need a plan in order to do this Fix for the API keys
We need to contact the third-party currency exchange rate service provider to request a new API key.
Also will need to secure the secrets manager to store the new API key, just to make sure its not hard-coded into source code and prevent unauthorised access.
someone needs to update the configuration of the currency service to use the new API key for accessing the third-party service

API keyes were misconfigured, looking at sorting that now

Great work. FYI team, I'll be looking into the licences for our other API keys later to make sure everything's shipshape.
What a ride! Massive thanks to each of you for your quick thinking and teamwork.
Absolutely, Shay! Getting more confident with any incidents that come our way. Good Job everyone!!
Great work team
Phew, what a rollercoaster! Glad we managed to fix it before things got out of hand.
Good job everyone, but im confused how did those currencies fail recently if the change was made hours ago?
Good question @Tinus. The currency_service was using 'cache data' instead of getting the data from 3rd party service as i messed up the configuration of the APIs.
The cache data expires every 12 hours as well which must have been around the time Bob was getting the new reports.
Understood, thanks for clearing that up for me @Hamed.
Anyways with the fix in place, we've ensured that the system operates smoothly, and we're now ready once again for the big event next week.
Fantastic work, everyone! Your quick and effective response has saved the day. Now, let's channel this momentum into making our Hipster Haul Weekend a smashing success.
Thank you all for your dedication and hard work.
